name: obsidian-llm-wiki
description: LLM Wiki pattern for an active Obsidian vault. Seven skills (wiki-ingest, wiki-scan, wiki-query, wiki-save, wiki-lint, wiki-hot, wiki-tags-refresh) compile knowledge from meetings, projects, daily notes, and raw sources into a persistent, cross-referenced wiki at Knowledge/wiki/. Supports GitHub Copilot and Claude Code as first-class agents.
